name: image-resizer-lambda
description: AWS Lambda para redimensionar imágenes usando Sharp

scripts.build: docker run --rm -v "%cd%:/var/task" public.ecr.aws/sam/build-nodejs20.x:latest bash -lc "cd /var/task && rm -rf node_modules && npm ci --omit=dev --include=optional && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/lambda.zip && zip -r dist/lambda.zip handler.js services interfaces useCases package.json node_modules"
